programs.title: Coast Guard Alaska
programs.desc: The Coast Guard faces gale force winds and relentless waves to rescue the crew of a battered fishing vessel, an injured hiker, and a pair of ailing patients in Kodiak and Sitka.

programs.title: Coast Guard Alaska
programs.desc: Air Station Sitka rushes to the aid of both an unconscious woman on a cruise ship and a small child suffering from seizures  respond to a ship going under.

programs.title: Coast Guard Alaska
programs.desc: The Coast Guard races to a medevac in the remote Bering Sea, bails out a vessel taking on water and saves a pair of fisherman who suffer grave accidents.

programs.title: Customs
programs.desc: A ton of cannabis concealed in a truck is discovered at Dover and an intimate search gets to the bottom of a suspected heroin smuggler at Gatwick.

programs.title: Customs
programs.desc: In Dover, a giant X-ray machine helps officers tackle industrial scale smugglers hoping to hide amongst the thousands of trucks flooding through the port each day.

programs.title: Customs
programs.desc: In Bristol, customs officer Ann catches three passengers with 87 kilos of tobacco worth thousands of pounds.
